activeIncidents.name: Adyen active incident: Degraded performance for 3D Secure authentications for Mastercard July 15 2026, 09:23 CEST Payments Updated July 15 2026, 10:48 CEST Following the mitigation measures applied by Adyen at 09:28 CEST and by Mastercard at 10:10 CEST, we have seen significant recovery in 3D Secure authentications for Mastercard transactions as of 10:39 CEST. A small number of Mastercard transactions requiring 3D Secure authentication may still fail. We are awaiting confirmation from Mastercard on full resolution. Updated July 15 2026, 10:34 CEST As of 10:10 CEST, Mastercard has applied further mitigation measures. Merchants should see continued improvement, though some Mastercard transactions requiring 3D Secure authentication may still fail. Mastercard is working to resolve the underlying issue. We are in contact with them and monitoring closely. Updated July 15 2026, 10:00 CEST As of 09:28 CEST, we have applied mitigation measures. Merchants should see a partial recovery, though some Mastercard transactions requiring 3D Secure authentication may still fail. Mastercard is working to resolve the underlying issue. We are in contact with them and monitoring closely. Updated July 15 2026, 09:37 CEST Mastercard has acknowledged an ongoing issue on their end affecting 3D Secure authentications, first identified at 08:59 CEST. Merchants may still experience an increased refusal rate for Mastercard transactions that require 3D Secure authentication. Mastercard is working to resolve the issue. We are in contact with them and monitoring closely. Identified July 15 2026, 09:23 CEST We have identified an issue starting at 08:59 CEST resulting in Mastercard transactions not being able to trigger or complete the 3D Secure authentications. As a result, merchants may experience an increased refusal rate for Mastercard transactions that require 3D Secure authentication. Our engineering team has been engaged and is urgently working to resolve this issue. We will provide an update as soon as we have more information.
